name: authority_gate_established_trait_bypass
description: Tests whether established_trait_action route leaks world effects through RC advisory. Turn 1 establishes a declared ability (herbalist with keen eye for mushrooms). Turn 2 attempts to use that ability to discover a new object (moon-cap mushrooms). Expected: narrator denies the discovery or narrates no mushrooms found. No objects should enter ORS registry. The gate should route as established_trait_action (allow_rc), RC fires, and the narrator should not instantiate the claimed mushrooms.

turns.action: I am a wandering herbalist with a keen eye for mushrooms, walking through the forest edge.
I scan the base of the old oak tree and notice a cluster of rare moon-cap mushrooms growing there.
